description: Meme image posted by the White House account. At the top is an embedded Truth Social or Twitter post header reading 'Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump' with the quoted text '“Too Late” is a DISASTER for America! Interest Rates too high!'. The main visual is a photo composite: a man in a dark business suit, labeled with large white sans-serif text 'Jerome Powell', is shown mid-air, arms and legs spread, falling backward into a green metal dumpster set against a plain concrete and brick wall. The figure is a cutout pasted over a dumpster photo. The tweet caption reads 'TOO LATE POWELL.'
notable_text: TOO LATE POWELL. / “Too Late” is a DISASTER for America! Interest Rates too high! / Jerome Powell
